channel.title: Liberalism on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in Liberalism on emsenn.net

item.title: Liberal Subjectivity as Information-Theoretic Malfunction
item.description:
Liberal subjectivity interpreted as a malfunctioning information-processing architecture: a system that maximizes internal coherence at the cost of correspondence with external informational reality.

Abstract

This paper interprets liberal subjectivity as a malfunctioning information-processing architecture. Extending the principle of information-theoretic stability, we show that the liberal subject functions as an over-stabilized adaptive system: one that maximizes internal coherence at the cost of correspondence with external informational reality.

By analyzing the feedback structure of liberal sociotechnical systems, we demonstrate how alignment mechanisms designed to preserve epistemic stability become sources of divergence amplification. This provides a cybernetic account of ideological self-maintenance as an entropic anomaly within the broader ecology of informational systems.

item.title: Conjecture: The anarchism of the liberal subject derives from civic duty and is thus incommensurable with decolonization
item.description:
• Conjecture :: The anarchism of the liberal subject derives from civic duty and is thus incommensurable with decolonization.

  • Proof :: unproven

  • claims ::

    • Given that liberal anarchism, that is, anarchism of the liberal subject, requires itself be functional within liberalism and thus a part of liberal worlding, it must maintain compatibility with liberalism.
    • Given the lineage of liberal anarchism is deviation of the lineage of liberal individualism, its a priori determinations may be derived from that lineage.

item.title: Conjecture: The anarchism of the liberal subject derives from civic duty and is thus incommensurable with decolonization
item.description:
• Conjecture :: The anarchism of the liberal subject derives from civic duty and is thus incommensurable with decolonization.

  • Proof :: unproven

  • claims ::

    • Given that liberal anarchism, that is, anarchism of the liberal subject, requires itself be functional within liberalism and thus a part of liberal worlding, it must maintain compatibility with liberalism.
    • Given the lineage of liberal anarchism is deviation of the lineage of liberal individualism, its a priori determinations may be derived from that lineage.

item.title: On the inherited Christianity of liberal subjectivity
item.description:
Original Post

Part 1

I’ve been talking about it in deeply Western terms but from my perspective a lot of what I’m thinking about is just variants of, how do I explain the deeply Christian ideology of many things that believe themselves to be secular and atheist, including lots of people who strongly emotionally identify with their existence as Other-than-Christian and take every bit of aesthetic and belief they can see in themselves as evidence that’s true.
